_meta.description: Advantage list and mechanics metadata for Mutants & Masterminds 4e character creation. All 'description' fields are short, original text written for this project's UI (always-visible label copy), not taken from the rulebook. Mechanical fields (types, ranked, maxRank, focused) reflect game rules/facts, not copyrighted prose.
_meta.cost: 1 Power Point per advantage, or 1 Power Point per rank for ranked advantages.

typeKey.Command: Lets you direct or boost allies
typeKey.Reaction: Used via your reaction, often off your turn

_meta.rankedNote: When 'ranked' is true, buy multiple ranks for a bigger effect. 'maxRank' gives a hard cap when the rulebook specifies one (e.g. 'Ranked 2'); null means no fixed cap beyond normal Power Level limits.
_meta.focusedNote: When 'focused' is true, each selection applies to one specific focus (a skill, environment, effect, etc.) and must be bought again separately for another focus.
_meta.initiativeNote: Optional initiative mechanics read by the derived-stat layer: 'initiativeBonusPerRank' adds that many points to the initiative modifier per rank (Improved Initiative = 4); 'initiativeAbilityChoice' lists the abilities this advantage may switch initiative to (Alternate Initiative), the chosen one stored as the selection's parameter.

maxRankKindKey.fixed: A specific numeric cap from the rules, independent of Power Level (e.g. Improved Critical 4). 'maxRank' holds the number.
maxRankKindKey.power_level: Capped only by the Power Level limit of the trait it modifies (shared with base rank and other bonuses), not a standalone number.
maxRankKindKey.power_level_half: Improved Initiative's own cap: ceil(Power Level / 2) ranks in this advantage.
maxRankKindKey.heroic_budget: Drawn from the shared Heroic-advantage budget: floor(Power Level / 2) total ranks across every Heroic-type advantage.
maxRankKindKey.none: Not ranked, or ranked with no cap beyond GM discretion / normal Power Level limits.
